Key distinguishing features of the target:
- Has exactly 2 empty columns on the left
- Has exactly 3 filled columns on the right
- The filled section consists of 3 consecutive columns (columns 3, 4, 5)
- All rows are identical
- The pattern is uniform across all 5 rows

To distinguish from distractor 1: Target has 3 filled columns vs 2 in distractor 1

Good expressions could be:
